info.description:
API для информационной системы академического секретаря/методиста.
Включает управление документами, расписанием, задачами, уведомлениями и мессенджером.
info.title: Inf-Sys Secretary-Methodist API

post.description: Create a new notification for a user (admin only)
Create notifications for multiple users (admin only)

get.description: Returns recent activity across all modules (documents, reports, tasks, events, announcements)

post.description: Exports dashboard statistics and trends to PDF or Excel format

get.description: Returns KPI statistics including documents, reports, tasks, events, and students counts

parameters.description: Period for comparison (week, month, quarter, year)
parameters.name: period

get.description: Returns trend data for documents, reports, tasks, and events for charting
Retrieves version history for a specific document
get.summary: Get all versions of a document

post.description: Creates a new version snapshot of the current document state

get.description: Compares two versions and returns the differences
Retrieves details of a specific version
get.summary: Get a specific version of a document

delete.description: Deletes a specific version (cannot delete current version)

get.description: Gets file information and download URL from a specific version
get.summary: Get file from a specific version

post.description: Restores the document to a specific previous version
post.summary: Restore document to a previous version

get.description: Get a list of notifications for the authenticated user

delete.description: Delete all notifications for the authenticated user

Enable or disable a specific notification channel
Update quiet hours settings for the authenticated user

post.description: Reset notification preferences to defaults for the authenticated user

put.description: Mark all notifications as read for the authenticated user

get.description: Get notification statistics for the authenticated user
Get a list of available timezones for quiet hours configuration
Get the count of unread notifications for the authenticated user
Get a single notification by its ID

delete.description: Delete a notification by its ID

put.description: Mark a single notification as read

get.description: List custom reports with filtering and pagination

post.description: Create a new custom report template

get.description: Get available fields for custom report builder
Get all custom reports created by the current user
Get all public custom reports
Get a custom report by ID

post.description: Execute a custom report and get data
Export a custom report to PDF, Excel, or CSV
Removes the Telegram connection for the user

get.description: Returns the current Telegram connection status for the user

post.description: Generates a verification code for linking Telegram account
Receives and processes updates from Telegram Bot API

delete.summary: Remove a participant from an event

get.description: Get documents that the current user owns and has shared with others
Perform full-text search on documents with ranking and highlighting
Get documents shared with the current user
Get all permissions for a document
Get all public links for a document

Share a document with a user or role
Access a document via public link
